description: Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'ADT_Metadata_Tracker' to track patient ADT events. The channel must use a TCP Listener on port 6661 for HL7 v2.x data and a File Writer destination at '/tmp/adt_output/' with the filename pattern 'adt_${DATE}_${COUNT}.hl7'. Configure the channel to populate custom metadata columns for 'PatientMRN' (mapped to PID.3.1), 'PatientName' (mapped to PID.5), and 'EventType' (mapped to MSH.9.2). Process the test messages located at '/home/ga/adt_a01.hl7' and '/home/ga/adt_a04.hl7' and verify that the metadata is correctly populated. Access the system via the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin) or the provided terminal.
